g.text: Flat — exactly one token per deploy,
— split cost Δ EQUALLY per cosigner
BURN, balanced: the deploy COST Δ is
debited in EQUAL weight from each
cost ≠ fee ; flat ≠ balanced. The fee is computed AFTER the cost debit, against
the post-cost residual (admit only if Σ⟦c⟧ ≥ cost + fee).
supply pool Σ⟦·⟧ / validator fee channel F_v (accounting)
